Math Rendering

The sign flip cancels: $$(-g_x)^c \bmod N = (N - g_x)^c \bmod N = (-1)^c \cdot g_x^c \bmod N.$$

Inline math like $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$, magnitudes like $\approx 9.2 \times 10^{18}$, the group $(\mathbb{Z}/n\mathbb{Z})^*$ and $\delta \cdot \lfloor 15/8 \rfloor$ all convert, as do keys such as $\mathsf{pk}_a = g^{\mathsf{sk}_a} - \mathsf{pk}_v$.

Fractions $\frac{a+b}{2}$, roots $\sqrt{2}$, congruences $a \equiv b \pmod{N}$, sets $\{1, 3, 5\}$ and escaped delimiters \(a \le b\) work too.

The price was $99 and is now $79, while $5-$10 covers lunch.
